title: Fogulous
body:
# Fogulous
Fogulous is a resource pack that adds new fog effects to your world. Biomes have unique fog effects, which can be affected by weather and time of day.

Credit to [Cliff under a Tree](https://modrinth.com/datapack/clifftree) for most of the fog and sky colors.

It is highly recommended to use the [Cliff under a Tree](https://modrinth.com/datapack/clifftree) datapack alongside this, as it gives caves unique biome types allowing for specific fog effects.

[![polytone_banner](https://github.com/MehVahdJukaar/polytone/assets/24719182/7c5bb84a-5aa8-4883-9e23-c27e8ce60c22)](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone)
